Generate a new PMX event dataset from a fitted private model

Source: R/generate.R
generate_pmx.Rd

This function never reads source data. Repeated calls are post-processing and do not alter or consume the fitted model's privacy accounting.

Usage

generate_pmx(private_model, n_subjects = NULL, seed = 123)

Arguments

private_model

A fitted model from fit_private_pmx().

n_subjects

Optional positive number of new synthetic subjects. By default, generation uses the privacy-accounted subject-count release stored in the fitted model (the exact source count for the explicitly public fixture backend).

seed

Ordinary reproducibility seed for post-processing generation.

Value

An ordinary data frame or tibble with the declared public schema and a lightweight pmx_privacy attribute.

On this page
